issues.description: Only 2 sources, both from fachportal.gematik.de. Minimum met. No external standard or Wikipedia reference.
Technical claims (ISO 7816, NFC ISO 14443, RSA/ECC, X.509) are accurate. eGK G2.1 alias is appropriate.

Both sources are fachportal.gematik.de URLs that appear to be near-duplicate (notfalldaten-management vs notfalldaten). They may resolve to the same or very similar pages. Minimum source count met but diversity is weak.
Claims about voluntary use, data types stored, and access rights are consistent with official fachportal documentation. No inaccuracies found.
Überblick section is very short and consists only of a numbered list. No introductory prose beyond the list. Template requires 2-5 paragraphs in Überblick.
1. Januar 2023 Pflichtdatum for eAU transmission to Krankenkasse is confirmed. KIM as transport is correct.

articles.fixInstructions: Expand the Überblick section with 1-2 introductory sentences before the numbered list to describe what eAU is and why it was introduced.

issues.description: KIM 1.5.5 confirmed as current release at gemspec.gematik.de/releases/KIM_1_5_5. Spec version gemAnbT 1.6.8 / gemProdT 1.6.5 and February 2026 release date are plausible but not independently verified for exact version numbers.
Second source is a spec reference without a URL. Technically acceptable but a proper URL to gemspec.gematik.de would be stronger.

articles.fixInstructions: Replace the spec reference with a proper URL: https://gemspec.gematik.de/releases/KIM_1_5_5/

issues.description: GDAG failure confirmed: bill was in first reading (17 Oct 2024); Ampel coalition ended Nov 2024; second and third readings never occurred. Claim is accurate.
CDU/CSU+SPD Koalitionsvertrag (April 2025) reference to 'moderne Agentur' confirmed by aerztezeitung.de and koalitionsvertrag2025.de reporting.
CEO Dr. Florian Fuhrmann '15. Januar 2026 strategische Leitsätze' — plausible but no dedicated source URL in article for this specific claim.

articles.fixInstructions: Add a source URL for the 15 January 2026 strategic guidelines by Dr. Florian Fuhrmann, e.g. a gematik newsroom link.

issues.description: 28. Januar 2026 Sandbox start confirmed by BMDS Pressemitteilung 04/2026. BMDS and SPRIND as operators confirmed. Early 2027 public release confirmed.

'Nach 12 Monaten können alternative Wallet-Anbieter ihre Lösungen als EUDI-Wallet zertifizieren lassen.' The 12-month figure refers to the time after the first public stage launch (early 2027), not after the sandbox. This is consistent with BMDS statements.

KRITIS-Dachgesetz: Bundestag 29 January 2026 confirmed (bundestag.de kw05-2026), Bundesrat 6 March 2026 confirmed (bundesrat.de 1062. Sitzung). Registration deadline 17 July 2026 is stated but not independently verified in search results — plausible as 4 months after Bundesrat approval.

Grundschutz++ transition January 2026 confirmed by bsi.bund.de. Machine-readable format confirmed. The article says 'JSON-Format' — BSI uses OSCAL standard which can be JSON; this is technically correct but imprecise. Transition phase confirmed.

articles.fixInstructions: Optionally clarify that the machine-readable format is based on OSCAL (Open Security Controls Assessment Language), not merely generic JSON. Add a source for the 17 July 2026 registration deadline.

issues.description: DiGA E-Rezept October 2025 launch confirmed: BMG DiGAV amendment states 'tritt am 1. Oktober 2025 in Kraft' and gematik published Abschlussbericht for the pilot. The claim about 'rund 15 DiGA initial via E-Rezept' is unverified in exact count but consistent with pilot scope.
Verknüpfungen still says '[[E-Rezept]] (DiGA-Verordnungen per E-Rezept geplant)' — but E-Rezept for DiGA is already live since October 2025, not merely planned.

articles.fixInstructions: Update the Verknüpfungen entry for [[E-Rezept]] from 'geplant' to 'seit Oktober 2025 möglich'.

issues.description: April 2026 KIS mandatory ePA module confirmed: AOK Gesundheitspartner and DKG sources confirm that hospital TI allowance reductions begin if ePA not populated by April 1, 2026, based on DigiG / § 347 SGB V.
Launch date 15 January 2025 and Pflicht ab 1 Oktober 2025 previously confirmed and still correct.

Technical claims (ISO 7816, NFC ISO 14443, gSMC-KT, TCP/IP over LAN) are accurate per gematik specifications. ECC migration deadline 31 December 2026 is plausible and consistent with other TI articles.
Hersteller listed as 'Cherry, Ingenico und Worldline'. Ingenico's card terminal business was acquired by Worldline in 2020; listing both may be redundant or confusing.
Third source (gemSpec_KT) has no direct URL, just 'gemspec.gematik.de'. Should be a stable, specific URL.

articles.fixInstructions: Remove 'Ingenico' from manufacturer list or clarify it as 'Worldline (vormals Ingenico)'. Update third source to a specific gemspec URL.

issues.description: Article states 'Es gibt 17 Kassenärztliche Vereinigungen in Deutschland, eine je Bundesland (Bayern hat zwei: KVB und KV Bayerns).' This is wrong on two counts: (1) KVB IS KV Bayerns (Kassenärztliche Vereinigung Bayerns) — they are the same entity, not two. (2) The state with two KVen is Nordrhein-Westfalen (KV Nordrhein + KV Westfalen-Lippe). Bayern has exactly one KV.
The count of 17 KVen is confirmed by KBV and Wikipedia. The parenthetical explanation of why there are 17 (NRW has 2) is simply attributed to the wrong state.

articles.fixInstructions: Correct the parenthetical to: 'Es gibt 17 Kassenärztliche Vereinigungen in Deutschland, eine je Bundesland (Nordrhein-Westfalen hat zwei: KV Nordrhein und KV Westfalen-Lippe).' Remove the incorrect Bavaria reference.

issues.description: CDA R2 as the main standard confirmed. XML namespace urn:hl7-org:v3 is correct. German CDA development in the 2000s confirmed (Sciphox initiative 2000-2007, German physician letter specs published 2005). Claims are accurate.
No mention of CDA R3 (withdrawn by HL7 in favor of FHIR). Not a factual error but an omission that could be noted.

Article states PZN is vergeben by 'Informationssystem der ABDA, dem Deutschen Institut für Medizinische Dokumentation und Information ([[DIMDI]]/[[BfArM]]) und dem Deutschen Apotheken-Informations- und Warenwirtschaftssystem (IFAP)'. This is incorrect. PZN is issued solely by the IFA GmbH (Informationsstelle für Arzneispezialitäten GmbH), whose shareholders are ABDA, BPI, and PHAGRO. DIMDI has no role in PZN issuance (DIMDI was merged into BfArM in 2019 for drug approval databases, not PZN). 'IFAP' is a retail pharmacy software product, not a PZN issuing authority.
[[DIMDI]] is a broken wiki-link per test-report.json. No DIMDI article exists in the knowledge base.

articles.fixInstructions: Correct the PZN issuer description: 'Die PZN wird von der IFA GmbH (Informationsstelle für Arzneispezialitäten GmbH) vergeben, einer gemeinsamen Einrichtung von ABDA, BPI und PHAGRO.' Remove [[DIMDI]] reference. Source: https://www.ifaffm.de/de/ifa-gmbh.html

issues.description: [[BDSG]] appears twice as a wiki-link but no BDSG.md article exists in the knowledge base. Flagged by test-report.json as broken_link.
DSGVO in-force date 25 May 2018, EU Regulation 2016/679, Art. 9 categories, and Betroffenenrechte articles (15-22) are all correct.
The 6 Grundsätze (Art. 5) listed match the DSGVO text. GDNG Art. 9 Abs. 2 lit. i reference is correct.

articles.fixInstructions: Either create a stub article content/standards/BDSG.md or replace [[BDSG]] with plain text 'Bundesdatenschutzgesetz (BDSG)' where it appears.

issues.description: Only 2 sources. Acceptable minimum met, but HSM-B/Friendly-User-Test claim (March 2026) has no dedicated source.

Claims TI-Messenger Pro is 'seit Januar 2026 in Ausbaustufe 1 produktiv verfügbar'. gematik's own documentation indicates the specification work and test system updates for Pro 1.1 were still ongoing in February–March 2026, and productive availability for the broader market was not confirmed for January 2026. The article conflates approval/first-productive-instances with general availability.
The 'Kosten für Anbieter' subsection (EUR 180/60 per month) cites no source. These figures are unverifiable from official gematik sources in the article.

articles.fixInstructions: Clarify the January 2026 productive-launch claim: either add a source (e.g. gematik press release) confirming the exact date, or soften to 'ab Anfang 2026'. Add or remove the cost figures if no official source can be cited.

issues.description: 'über 19 zugelassene VPN-Zugangsdienstanbieter' — number is plausible but no source given for the exact count.
eHBA G2.0 transition deadline cited as '30. Juni 2026' here and in HBA.md — consistent.
Launch date '15. Januar 2025' and 'Pflicht ab 1. Oktober 2025' confirmed. April 2026 KIS sanctions confirmed by DigiG / § 347 SGB V. PoPP V1.0.0 on 3 March 2026 consistent with PoPP.md.
GDAG failure confirmed. CDU/CSU+SPD 'moderne Agentur' Koalitionsvertrag reference confirmed. Founded 2005 correct.
CEO Dr. Florian Fuhrmann '15. Januar 2026 strategische Leitsätze' — plausible, no dedicated source URL in article.

articles.fixInstructions: Add source URL for the 15 January 2026 strategic guidelines.

issues.description: EY role in ZETA development/maintenance contract is unverified. Public sources only confirm EY copyright on the Tiger test suite. The development/maintenance contract claim may be inaccurate.

articles.fixInstructions: Verify the EY development/maintenance contract claim. If unconfirmed, narrow it to: 'EY hält das Copyright an der ZETA Tiger Testsuite'.

issues.description: Claims that as of April 2026, per '§ 7 Abs. 4 IfSG', negative SARS-CoV-2 PCR results must be reported to DEMIS. Current IfSG (§ 7) requires reporting only of positive pathogen detections. No legislative source found for a change mandating negative test reporting.
April 2026 Stammdaten-Pflicht and updated Meldungsformat are plausible but have no source URL.

articles.fixInstructions: Remove or correct the negative SARS-CoV-2 PCR reporting claim. § 7 IfSG mandates only positive detections. If a legislative amendment is referenced, cite the specific Bundesgesetzblatt entry. Add sources for April 2026 Stammdaten-Pflicht changes.

issues.description: G2.1 ECC transition, Übergangsfrist 30. Juni 2026, confirmed by gematik RSA-to-ECC migration page. '30.000 eHBAs noch auszutauschen' unverifiable but plausible.
'Telekom-Kunden sind von der Übergangsfrist ausgenommen' — not confirmed by public gematik documentation.

articles.fixInstructions: Verify or remove the Telekom exception claim.

issues.description: Inkrafttreten 26 März 2024 confirmed. DSGVO Art. 9 references correct. FDZ at BfArM confirmed.
Third source is aok.de (health insurer). Fourth source is state DPA. Acceptable but peripheral.
Only 2 sources. Minimum met.
DocMorris/Redcare CardLink extension until January 2027 — plausible but no official source cited.

articles.fixInstructions: Add a source for the DocMorris/Redcare CardLink extension until January 2027.

issues.description: States 'Die gematik betreibt den NCPeH im Auftrag des BMG.' According to fachportal.gematik.de, the NCPeH is operated by DVKA (Deutsche Verbindungsstelle Krankenversicherung Ausland). gematik's role is specification and product type confirmation, not operation.
Only 2 sources; first is a generic gematik newsroom URL without a specific article path.

articles.fixInstructions: Correct the operator: DVKA (Deutsche Verbindungsstelle Krankenversicherung Ausland) betreibt den NCPeH; gematik ist für Spezifikation und Produkttypzulassung zuständig. Replace the generic newsroom URL with a specific article URL.

issues.description: ## Technische Details section is missing as a top-level H2. It exists as a subsection (### Technische Details) under ## Architektur, causing test.sh to flag a structural failure.
aliases field is missing from frontmatter. test.sh confirms this.

articles.fixInstructions: 1. Add aliases to frontmatter: aliases: [Elektronisches Rezept, eRezept]. 2. Promote '### Technische Details' to '## Technische Details' (H2 heading).

contradictions.articleA: content/processes/VSDM.md says VSDM 1.0 Abschaltung Mitte 2027 after February 2027 full rollout
contradictions.articleB: gemspec.gematik.de PoPP spec page (external) referenced 'planned shutdown of VSDM1 for March 31, 2026' — but this may refer to VSDM++ not VSDM 1.0 core. No internal article contradicts VSDM.md directly. Flag for monitoring.

staleArticles: content/technologies/DEMIS.md — claims negative SARS-CoV-2 PCR results become reportable April 2026 per § 7 Abs. 4 IfSG; no legislative basis found for this change.
content/technologies/TI-Messenger.md — TI-Messenger Pro produktiv January 2026 claim needs sourcing; gematik documentation suggests specification work was still ongoing in February 2026.
content/infrastructure/NCPeH.md — incorrectly attributes NCPeH operation to gematik; operator is DVKA.
content/organization/Kassenaerztliche-Vereinigung.md — incorrectly attributes the two-KV split to Bayern; it is Nordrhein-Westfalen (KV Nordrhein + KV Westfalen-Lippe) that has two KVen.
content/standards/PZN.md — incorrectly names DIMDI as PZN issuer; PZN is issued by IFA GmbH.
